# Minimal Operator Surface

## Summary

Define and build the smallest useful operator/admin surface needed to run the pilot without relying entirely on raw API calls.

## Scope

Potential areas:

- stale leads
- lead timeline
- business settings
- recent notification outcomes

## Goals

- Identify the minimum operational UI or admin surface needed for pilot support.
- Avoid building a broad frontend.
- Focus on operator usefulness over design polish.

## Tasks

- [ ] Define the minimum operator workflows.
- [ ] Decide whether to use a simple internal page, admin endpoint set, or basic frontend scaffold.
- [ ] Prioritize lead queue, timeline, stale leads, and settings visibility.

## Acceptance Criteria

- The pilot can be run without requiring deep API/manual inspection for everyday operations.
- Scope remains minimal and backend-led.
